text: I really wanted this to be a good experience, but unfortunately, it wasn't. We contacted this mobile mechanic service when our car wouldn't start, hoping for a quick fix. It was late, we were stuck in a parking garage at 10 PM with no tools, and we trusted their guidance. The mechanic started service around 4 or 5 PM and we didn't leave until 1 AM. We were charged $681 total, including $165 for a diagnostic and the cost/labor for two batteries. The mechanic mentioned we could replace the batteries ourselves to save money, but that really wasn't realistic given the situation we were in. The biggest issue was the lack of communication. For hours, there was no clear diagnostic explanation, and it wasn't until after the batteries were replaced around 10 PM that we were told the issue might be related to a computer system failure. After everything was done, we still didn't have a working car, and we were left without any real answers or codes to understand the problem. Eventually, we had to tow the car to Pep Boys, where they diagnosed and fixed the issue for just $177. We feel that this mobile service could've been more transparent and provided clearer communication throughout the process.

I generally do not leave reviews, but I couldn't, in good conscience, not alert others to the experience I just encountered with Tech On The Way (TOTW). I initially spoke to Whitney but was later referred to Celena to confirm a price. On the appointment day, Celena arrived at my home around 7 pm, the very end of the appointment window for what I was initially told was a 3.5-hour job. At 12 midnight, she was still working on my automobile, at 1am the next day she was still working. At 2 am, 3 am, and 4 am she was still working. She did not finish working on my automobile until 6 am the next morning — 11 straight hours. When I went out to inquire what was taking so long, Celena seemed to get irritated and brushed me off.

Celena is a wonderful professional that responded within minutes by phone. She listened to me and was willing to go out of her way to assist. I thank God for a professional service like Tech On The Way Mobile!

Celena was an angel sent to me at a time of distress...let's talk about it. One of my fleet vans broke down at the gas station AFTER I had just picked it up from a mechanic for a different issue. I thought I only needed a battery jump, but turns out I needed a battery replacement as well as an alternator. Celena went above and beyond. Mind you, I had not called her. She just so happened to be at the gas station getting some things in between her service call. Celena made time for my issue, made sure that she diagnosed the issue to the fullest, repaired it, and ensures I was alright. I know this has nothing to do with service itself, but in 2025 when the world is so dark and heavy, I value a genuine spirit. Thank you so much Celena. I pray your business continues to flourish!

Very detailed and thorough in the diagnostic. Loved the emphasis on making sure everything was checked. Looking forward to an ongoing business relationship. Thank you so much for taking the time to share your experience and trusting Tech On The Way with your vehicle!

She's been the family mechanic for the last few years. She's repaired all type of things on all of our vehicles. She great and always available when needed. Affordable prices and very punctual. 10/10 would recommend

Celena is the first person that I will call from now on because she is dedicated to finishing the job. After I received an estimate, Celena came out to the site and provided a diagnosis. Yes, as some others have mentioned, she was not on time but what mechanical service is ever "on time"...mobile or stationary? Anyway, even after Celena realized the repair was more involved than anticipated, she made every effort to complete the job as efficiently as possible. I respect Celena's years of experience and commitment to get the job done.

This company was a life saver! My brakes started making loud noises. I contacted a different mobile mechanic who agreed to an appointment but later cancelled 30 mins later because of the rain. So I was stuck at an auto store and couldn't move my vehicle. Did a search and found Tech on the way. She was able to get to me within an hour and proceeded to work on my car while it was raining cats and dogs! She completed the job quickly and was also able to determine a problem that 5 other mechanics couldn't figure out. I highly recommend the company and as a female I felt like I could trust her. Pricing was fair and the tech was polite and professional!

Not only was it quick and simple to set up the appointment, but the mechanic was willing to use the car parts I purchased online. She kept me updated when she was on the way, and is very knowledgeable + professional. My car is finally tuned up and driving perfectly, I'm so thankful. If you're in Atlanta and looking for someone to work on your vehicle, don't even bother calling anyone else - Tech on the way is the best value and experience you will find.

I was unable to re install my fuel tank. Also had a fuel delivery problem. Celena showed up slightly late. Got right to work. Installed the tank in about 1 1/2 hours. Went straight to the fuel pump. Fixed the issue.
